svg.text: two shapes, one folder of tools. pick by use case, not by tradition.

g.text: drop samples on pads. no song timeline. consumed by ppak-load-manifest / ppak-load-one.
default for samples missing their own bpm
↑ one entry per sample · array can be empty for top-level-only manifests
multi-pattern, multi-scene project from an ableton-style timeline. consumed by ppak-export-song.
file_path ↕ file · resolver fails clearly if these don't line up
source render tempo · pads tagged stretch_mode="bpm"
slot · 0..19 per group · maps to global slot 700 + group_offset + slot
just want to put samples on pads?
its session/stems registry. anyone can produce
these by hand from another DAW too.
